name: Off Memooleh Betapoozim (Chicken Stuffed with Oranges)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 425°F. Rinse the chicken inside and out under cold running water. Pat dry with paper towels.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan. Cut the lemon in half and rub one half over the surface of the chicken. In a small bowl, mix the spices together and sprinkle over the chicken. Squeeze the juice from the lemon half and from 1 of the oranges into the roasting pan and add water. Place the remaining orange, whole and unpeeled, in the chicken cavity. Cut the onions in half and add to the pan.
Cook the chicken for 15 minutes, then baste with the pan juices and lower the heat to 350°F. Cook for 1 hour, basting after 30 minutes. Remove the orange from the cavity of the chicken. Cut the orange and onions into small pieces and serve with the chicken. This dish is delicious with rice or pasta.
